scenario: Clean all-in rate — straightforward bid, easy to parse
subject: Re: Flatbed Dallas to Atlanta — Rate Confirmation
body:
Hi Jillian,

We can cover this load. Here's our rate:

Lane: Dallas, TX → Atlanta, GA
Equipment: Flatbed (48ft)
Rate: $2,850 all-in
Pickup: April 15, 2026
Delivery: April 17, 2026
Driver: Will have tarps

Rate includes fuel surcharge. Valid for 48 hours.

Let us know if you'd like to book.

Lone Star Transport
Dispatch: (972) 555-0311
